retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the function itself performs cleanup and always completes. No condition for retry arises from refcount operations.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is cleanup/destruction of all watches and the parent's fsnotify mark, not refcount management. Contains extensive business logic: iterate watches/rules, log rule changes, remove exe marks, list removal, call_rcu, and fsnotify_destroy_mark. audit_remove_watch (a put function) is just one step among many.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the function itself performs cleanup and always completes. No condition for retry arises from refcount operations.
